title: FUBP1/2/3 dTag protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ako8v","text":"This is a protocol for knock-in of C-terminal FKBP-V with resistance cassettes into the FUBP1,2 and 3 loci with PITCh system.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: We will anneal following oligo duplexes into pX330-BbsI-PITCh: FUBP1-dTag-sgRNA: BKC735_FUBP1_sgRNA1_F + BKC736_FUBP1_sgRNA1_R FUBP2-dTag-sgRNA: BKC751_KHSRP_sgRNA1_F + BKC752_KHSRP_sgRNA1_R FUBP3-dTag-sgRNA: BKC753_FUBP3_sgRNA1_F + BKC754_FUBP3_sgRNA1_R

Digest pX330-BbsI-PITCh: 02:00:00 37 °C, thermal cycler 3 µg pX330-BbsI-PITCh midiprep DNA 3 µL BbsI-HF - 1,500 units New England Biolabs Catalog #R3539L 3 µL rCutSmart Buffer New England Biolabs Catalog #B6004S total to 30 µL with nuclease-free H20
Briefly spin down PCR tubes to get rid of condensate. Add New 6x Purple Loading Dye New England Biolabs Catalog #B7024S 1:6 to digested plasmid (ie 6ul for 30ul digest).
Gel purify digested fragment using Wizard SV Gel and PCR Clean-Up System Promega Catalog #A9281
Weigh gel slice and add binding buffer 1:1 w/v eg. 500ul buffer for 500mg of gel weight.
Dissolve gel slice 55 °C , vortexing every 5 minutes to speed up dissolution. Continue until no chunks remain and slurry is completely liquid.
creator: Bercin Cenik
